_comment: Org-level push ruleset (target: push) — restricts direct pushes that touch governance-only files (rulesets, CODEOWNERS, license, contributing, security docs). Intentionally narrow so Dependabot (package.json/lock) and developers (workflows, copilot config) can work on feature branches without needing admin bypass. The broader path set that existed here previously was moved to CODEOWNERS review (enforced at merge time by protect-default-branch). _org_level=true routes this ruleset to POST /orgs/{org}/rulesets in configure-rulesets.sh.
name: Protect workflows, license, and config files

bypass_actors._comment: Admin (repo owner). Only admins should directly modify governance files.
